items.question: What is AI automation and how can it help my business?
items.answer: AI automation uses artificial intelligence to handle repetitive tasks, make decisions, and optimize workflows without human intervention. For businesses, this means faster lead response times, fewer errors, lower operational costs, and the ability to scale without proportionally increasing headcount. We specialize in GoHighLevel, Zapier, Make, and custom AI integrations.

items.question: How long does it take to implement an automation?
items.answer: Most projects go from diagnosis to deployment in 2-6 weeks, depending on complexity. A simple chatbot can be live in under a week. A comprehensive business process automation typically takes 3-4 weeks. We prioritize speed without sacrificing quality.

items.question: What platforms do you work with?
items.answer: We're experts in GoHighLevel, Zapier, Make (Integromat), OpenAI GPT, Twilio, Stripe, HubSpot, and most major CRM and marketing platforms. We also build custom solutions when off-the-shelf tools don't fit.

items.question: How much does it cost?
items.answer: Projects typically range from $2,000 for focused automations to $12,000+ for comprehensive business transformation packages. Every engagement starts with a free diagnostic call where we identify the highest-ROI opportunities for your specific situation.

items.question: Do I need technical knowledge to use the automations?
items.answer: Not at all. We design every system to be operated by non-technical team members. Every project includes hands-on training, documentation, and ongoing support. If your team can use email, they can use our automations.

items.question: What results can I expect?
items.answer: Our clients typically see 3-5x improvement in lead response time, 40-70% reduction in manual task hours, and measurable increases in conversion rates within the first month. We track specific KPIs for every engagement.

ai-chatbots.title: AI Chatbots & Virtual Assistants
ai-chatbots.subtitle: Intelligent conversational agents that work 24/7 to qualify leads, support customers, and drive revenue.
ai-chatbots.description: Our AI chatbots go beyond scripted responses. Built on GPT and custom-trained on your business data, they understand context, qualify prospects, book appointments, and escalate complex issues — all while maintaining your brand voice.

features.description: Never miss a lead. Your chatbot responds instantly, day or night, in English and Spanish.

features.title: CRM Integration
features.description: Seamlessly syncs with GoHighLevel, HubSpot, Salesforce, and other CRMs.

features.title: Multilingual Support
features.description: Serve customers in multiple languages with native-quality responses.

automation.title: Business Process Automation
automation.subtitle: Custom workflows that eliminate manual tasks, reduce errors, and let your team focus on what matters.
automation.description: We design and deploy intelligent automation systems using GoHighLevel, Zapier, Make, and custom code. From lead nurturing sequences to internal approval workflows, we turn repetitive processes into reliable, hands-free operations.

features.title: Workflow Design
features.description: Custom-built automation flows tailored to your exact business processes.

lead-generation.description: We build end-to-end lead generation systems that combine landing pages, forms, email sequences, SMS follow-ups, and AI-powered scoring. Every touchpoint is automated and optimized for maximum conversion.

ai-consulting.description: Not sure where to start with AI? Our consulting engagements begin with a comprehensive audit of your operations, identify the highest-ROI automation opportunities, and deliver a clear implementation roadmap. We help you make informed decisions about AI adoption.

about.title: About Agency Level 5
about.subtitle: We're operators who build for operators.
about.story: Agency Level 5 was founded with a simple belief: every business deserves the operational intelligence that used to be reserved for enterprise companies. We combine deep expertise in AI, automation, and growth strategy to help businesses eliminate bottlenecks and scale efficiently.
about.mission: To make intelligent automation accessible to every growth-focused business — not just those with million-dollar tech budgets.

values.title: Results Over Features
values.description: We measure success by your ROI, not by how many tools we implement.

values.title: Speed With Quality
values.description: We deploy fast because your business can't wait, but never at the expense of reliability.

values.title: Radical Transparency
values.description: No black boxes. You understand every system we build, and you own it completely.

app.name: Workflow Bottleneck Score
app.description: Identify hidden friction, manual dependencies, and visibility gaps in your internal operations. Get a professional assessment of your workflow maturity.

landing.title: Is your workflow scaling, or just surviving?
landing.subtitle: Most B2B companies lose 20-30% of their operational capacity to hidden friction — manual follow-ups, fragmented data, and opaque handoffs.

lead.title: Your Preliminary Analysis is Ready
lead.subtitle: We have identified key areas of friction. Enter your details to unlock the full executive report and pillar breakdown.
lead.name: Full Name
lead.privacy: Your data is handled with strict confidentiality.

results.title: Operational Diagnostic Report
results.ctaDescription: Book a 15-minute diagnostic call to discuss these results and explore a custom automation roadmap for your business.
results.scoreDescription: A higher score indicates a more robust, digital, and scalable operational foundation.
results.sharePrompt: Challenge your network — how does their company compare?

fragile.label: Fragile
fragile.description: Operations depend heavily on individual memory and manual effort. High risk of error and burnout.

reactive.label: Reactive
reactive.description: Processes exist but are fragmented. Management spends most of their time firefighting instead of scaling.

functional.label: Functional but Constrained
functional.description: Solid foundation, but manual handoffs and visibility gaps are preventing the next level of growth.

strong.label: Strong Foundation
strong.description: Highly digital and automated. Operations are a competitive advantage, not a bottleneck.

manual_followup.title: Manual Follow-up Dependency
manual_followup.description: Work moves because people remember to push it, not because the system pulls it forward.

visibility_gap.title: Operational Visibility Gap
visibility_gap.description: Management lacks real-time insight into job status, leading to reactive decision-making.

fragmented_data.title: Data Fragmentation
fragmented_data.description: Information is scattered across WhatsApp, Excel, and Email, creating islands of knowledge.

approval_friction.title: Approval & Handoff Friction
approval_friction.description: Critical stages are delayed waiting for manual sign-offs or lost in email threads.

reporting_blindness.title: Reporting Blindness
reporting_blindness.description: Lack of automated KPIs makes it impossible to identify where the business is actually losing money.
